allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD="admin" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bdcesar -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as usuarios FROM auth.users;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="admin" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bdcesar -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as tiendas FROM shop.artisan_shops;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="admin" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bdcesar -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as productos FROM shop.products;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="admin" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bdcesar -c "\\d shop.stores")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="admin" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bdcesar -c "\\d shop.artisan_shops")
